question: Were there any board member nominees who had substantially more votes against joining than the other nominees?
answer: Yes, Richard A. Johnson received 16,105,005 votes against, which is substantially higher than the other nominees (the next highest being Dona D. Young with 6,074,467 votes against) [PAGE 2].
